task_completion.description: Agent opened and read the divestiture memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/divestiture_memo.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the new Job Title in the HRMS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo HRMS configuration interface showing 'Divestiture Transition Staff' added to the list of Job Titles.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the new Employment Status in the HRMS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo HRMS configuration interface showing 'Divested Entity' added to the list of Employment Statuses.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the target employees with the new Job Title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Employee profiles or employee list in the Sentrifugo HRMS showing target employees (e.g., EMP008, EMP010, etc.) assigned the Job Title 'Divestiture Transition Staff'.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the target employees with the new Employment Status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Employee profiles or employee list in the Sentrifugo HRMS showing target employees (e.g., EMP008, EMP010, etc.) assigned the Employment Status 'Divested Entity'.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the target employees' email addresses to the new domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Employee profiles or employee list in the Sentrifugo HRMS showing target employees with email addresses ending in '@qaserve.com' (preserving their first.last prefixes).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Sentrifugo HRMS via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and submitting forms within a web browser interface, not just using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing MySQL commands or scripts executing direct database updates to the employees.

integrity.description: Agent performed the updates in the actual HRMS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates to job titles, employment statuses, and emails must be visible within the Sentrifugo HRMS UI, rather than just typed out in a text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employees to update: EMP008, EMP010, EMP012, EMP015, EMP018, EMP020. New Job Title: 'Divestiture Transition Staff'. New Employment Status: 'Divested Entity'. New Email Domain: '@qaserve.com'.
